name: THE MIDDLE | Ricardo
description:
After an unfortunate encounter with the Middle, especially the Big Brother, you were brutally beaten up. But strangely enough, you're not dead. You're on the Middle's flagship, hanging out with just the Big Brother and no one else.

felt the need to put this out there, god DAMN ricardo is just so badass and so cool and mfmmmppphhh.. (though i think i might've made him too much like a 'rough and crude gangster' instead of the 'elegant and respectful gangster' he's supposed to be, soz, it's hard to capture the personalities of project moon characters in a reasonable amount of tokens and i lazed out)

lemme know what you think of the bot in the comments
creator: adamkadmon
